videoSnippet.title: "The Better Player is Always Better" || Vasyl Ivanchuk vs Christophe Sochacki || Reykjavik Open 2026

Ivanchuk, Vasyl (2624) - Sochacki, Christophe (2459) 1-0
Reykjavik Open 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.03.27
C01 French, exchange variation


1.e4 e6 2.d4 d5 3.exd5 exd5 4.Bd3 Nf6 5.Ne2 c5 6.c3 Nc6 7.O-O Bd6 8.Bf4 cxd4 9.Bxd6 Qxd6 10.Nxd4 Nxd4 11.cxd4 O-O 12.Nc3 Be6 13.Qd2 Rac8 14.Rae1 Rfd8 15.f3 Qb4 16.Qf2 Nh5 17.Kh1 h6 18.Qd2 Kf8 19.Bb1 Rc4 20.Rd1 Qd6 21.Rfe1 Qf4 22.Qf2 Nf6 23.a3 Ng4 24.Qg1 Nf6 25.Re5 Nd7 26.Nxd5 Qh4 27.Re4 Qg5 28.Ne3 Rcc8 29.d5 Nf6 30.f4 Qh5 31.Re5 g5 32.dxe6 Rxd1 33.e7+ Kg7 34.Nxd1 Rc1 35.Re1 Qh4 36.Bd3 g4 37.g3 Qh5 38.Qd4
